name: LTC PROPERTIES INC
summary: LTC Properties, Inc. is a Maryland-incorporated REIT founded in 1992 that invests primarily in seniors housing and health care properties. Its portfolio includes independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing facilities operated through triple-net leases, financing receivables, mortgage loans, notes receivable, unconsolidated joint ventures, and a SHOP segment. As of December 31, 2025, total net investments were approximately $2.0 billion across 186 properties in multiple states.

products.name: Triple-Net Leases
products.description: Non-cancelable triple-net leases on owned seniors housing and skilled nursing properties requiring lessees to pay taxes, insurance, maintenance and other costs.

products.name: Financing Receivables
products.description: Joint venture sale-leaseback transactions accounted for as financing receivables, covering 31 properties in three states.

products.name: Mortgage Loans Receivable
products.description: First mortgage financing on seniors housing and skilled nursing properties, including construction loans, secured by 26 properties in five states.

products.name: Notes Receivable
products.description: Mezzanine and working capital loans to seniors housing operators.

products.name: SHOP Segment
products.description: Seniors housing operating portfolio managed by independent third-party operators under management agreements, comprising 25 communities in ten states.

products.name: Unconsolidated Joint Ventures
products.description: ADC mortgage loan on a skilled nursing center in Texas accounted for as an unconsolidated joint venture.
